sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّرْحَالَ فِي مَفْهُومِهِ الْأَنْطُولُوجِيِّ الْعَمِيقِ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ انْتِقَالٍ فِيزْيَائِيٍّ بَيْنَ الْإِحْدَاثِيَّاتِ الْجُغْرَافِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Putovanje u svom dubokom ontološkom smislu nije samo fizičko kretanje između geografskih koordinata.
sentences.translationEn: Travel, in its profound ontological sense, is not merely a physical displacement between geographical coordinates.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّهُ انْعِتَاقٌ سَيْرُورِيٌّ مِنَ الرَّتَابَةِ الْآسِنَةِ نَحْوَ مَجَاهِلِ الذَّاتِ قَبْلَ مَجَاهِلِ الْآفَاقِ.
sentences.translation: To je procesualno oslobađanje od ustajale monotonije prema nepoznatim dubinama sopstva prije nepoznatih horizonata.
sentences.translationEn: It is a processual liberation from stagnant monotony toward the unknowns of the self before the unknowns of horizons.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمُسَافِرُ الْحَقُّ هُوَ مَنْ يَسْتَنْطِقُ "رُوحَ الْمَكَانِ" وَيَسْتَجْلِي كُنْهَ الْحَضَارَاتِ الْبَائِدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pravi putnik je onaj koji ispituje 'duh mjesta' i otkriva suštinu prohujalih civilizacija.
sentences.translationEn: The true traveler is one who interrogates the 'genius loci' and unveils the essence of vanished civilizations.

sentences.arabic: تَرْبِضُ هَذِهِ الْحَضَارَاتُ بَيْنَ جَنَبَاتِ الْأَطْلَالِ الشَّاخِصَةِ، حَيْثُ تَتَمَازَجُ عَبَقِيَّةُ التَّارِيخِ بِتَفَاصِيلِ الْحَاضِرِ.
sentences.translation: Ove civilizacije počivaju unutar postojanih ruševina, gdje se genijalnost historije stapa s detaljima proživljene sadašnjosti.
sentences.translationEn: These civilizations reside within the standing ruins, where the brilliance of history blends with the details of the lived present.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِانْغِمَاسَ فِي غَيَاهِبِ الْمُدُنِ الْعَتِيقَةِ يُعِيدُ صِيَاغَةَ الْمَنْظُورِ الْإِنْسَانِيِّ لِلْوُجُودِ.
sentences.translation: Uranjanje u tmine drevnih gradova redefiniše ljudsku perspektivu postojanja.
sentences.translationEn: Immersing oneself in the depths of ancient cities redefines the human perspective of existence.

sentences.arabic: بِمَأْذِنِهَا السَّامِقَةِ وَأَزِقَّتِهَا الْمُلْتَوِيَةِ، تَصِيرُ الْمُدُنُ كَشَرَايِينِ الزَّمَنِ.
sentences.translation: Sa svojim visokim minaretima i krivudavim uličicama, gradovi postaju poput arterija vremena.
sentences.translationEn: With their towering minarets and winding alleys, cities become like the arteries of time.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ ذَلِكَ، فَإِنَّ ظَاهِرَةَ "السِّيَاحَةِ الِاسْتِهْلَاكِيَّةِ" الْمُعَاصِرَةِ قَدْ أَفْقَدَتِ السَّفَرَ جَوْهَرَهُ.
sentences.translation: Ipak, fenomen savremenog 'konzumerističkog turizma' oduzeo je putovanju njegovu suštinu.
sentences.translationEn: However, the phenomenon of contemporary 'consumer tourism' has robbed travel of its essence.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ غَدَتِ الرِّحْلَةُ مُجَرَّدَ سِلْعَةٍ تُبَاعُ فِي مَزَادِ التَّبَاهِي الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Putovanje je postalo puka roba koja se prodaje na aukciji društvenog razmetanja.
sentences.translationEn: The journey has become a mere commodity sold in the auction of social posturing.

sentences.arabic: تَآكَلَتِ الْأَصَالَةُ تَحْتَ وَطْأَةِ التَّسْوِيقِ، حَيْثُ يُحَاصَرُ السَّائِحُ بِقَوَالِبَ جَاهِزَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Autentičnost je izjedena pod pritiskom marketinga, gdje je turista zarobljen u gotovim kalupima.
sentences.translationEn: Authenticity has eroded under the weight of marketing, where the tourist is trapped in ready-made molds.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْمَسَارَاتُ الْمُعَلَّبَةُ تَحْرِمُهُ مِنْ لَذَّةِ الِاكْتِشَافِ الْعَفْوِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ove upakovane rute lišavaju ga užitka spontanog otkrivanja.
sentences.translationEn: These pre-packaged routes deprive them of the pleasure of spontaneous discovery.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْعَوْدَةَ إِلَى مَفْهُومِ "الرِّحْلَةِ" تَقْتَضِي نَبْذَ الْقُشُورِ وَالنَّفَاذَ إِلَى لُبِّ التَّجْرِبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Povratak konceptu 'rihle' (putopisa/putovanja) zahtijeva odbacivanje površnosti i prodiranje u srž iskustva.
sentences.translationEn: Returning to the concept of the 'Rihla' (journey) requires discarding the superficial and penetrating the core of the experience.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَهَا يَتَحَوَّلُ الْمَطَارُ مِنْ نُقْطَةِ عُبُورٍ لُوجِسْتِيَّةٍ إِلَى بَوَّابَةٍ لِلتَّحَوُّلِ الْبَاطِنِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Tada se aerodrom pretvara iz logističke tranzitne tačke u kapiju unutrašnje transformacije.
sentences.translationEn: Then, the airport transforms from a logistical transit point into a gateway for internal transformation.

sentences.arabic: فَالْخَرِيطَةُ لَيْسَتْ هِيَ الْإِقْلِيمَ، بَلْ هِيَ رَسْمٌ بَيَانِيٌّ لِأَشْوَاقٍ تَتُوقُ لِمُعَانَقَةِ الْمَجْهُولِ.
sentences.translation: Karta nije teritorija, već puki dijagram čežnji koje teže zagrljaju nepoznatog.
sentences.translationEn: The map is not the territory, but a mere diagram of longings yearning to embrace the unknown.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّهَا رِحْلَةٌ لِتَجَاوُزِ الْحُدُودِ الْوَهْمِيَّةِ لِلْهُوِيَّةِ الضَّيِّقَةِ.
sentences.translation: To je putovanje ka prevazilaženju iluzornih granica uskog identiteta.
sentences.translationEn: It is a journey to transcend the illusory boundaries of narrow identity.
